name: Developer VIEN - PORTFOLIO
description: Personal portfolio for an aspiring developer, Vien Calderon!
about: It is a unique web-based dev-portfolio for Vien Fritzgerald V. Calderon. It's goal is to simplify the hiring process of the man behind this site.
contributions: I built this bare-handed using front-end stacks of HTML, CSS, and JS then as for storing data such as projects, certifications and cv/resume, I use github-fetching capabilities with json as a highway in mind.
